div.inline-title.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(255, 221, 147) 0px, rgb(248, 113, 113) 30%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box text

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(255, 221, 147) 0px, rgb(248, 113, 113) 30%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box text

h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(252, 165, 165) 0px, rgb(236, 72, 153) 30%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box text

h3[data-heading=\"This is a heading 3\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(244, 114, 182) 0px, rgb(217, 70, 239) 30%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box text

h4[data-heading=\"This is a heading 4\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(232, 121, 249) 0px, rgb(59, 130, 246) 30%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box text

h5[data-heading=\"This is a heading 5\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(96, 165, 250) 0px, rgb(103, 232, 249) 30%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box text

h6[data-heading=\"This is a heading 6\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(165, 243, 252) 0px, rgb(74, 222, 128) 30%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box text

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(20, 23, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(45deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), rgb(150, 50, 50)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto border-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(20, 23, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(20, 23, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
